description: High-value operational routines that BMO should reach for before ad hoc debugging.

routines.name: doctor-plus
routines.purpose: Run the broad host/runtime sanity check before deeper troubleshooting.

routines.name: worker-status
routines.purpose: Check gateway health, agent health, and the latest task checkpoint in one step before mutating worker state.

routines.name: runtime-doctor
routines.purpose: Validate the BMO runtime profile, launch assumptions, and output path.

routines.name: workspace-sync
routines.purpose: Refresh the repo-backed OpenClaw workspace mirror after merges or context drift.

routines.name: site-caretaker
routines.purpose: Inventory the separate prismtek-site and prismtek-site-replica repos before claiming web parity or chat ownership.

routines.name: worker-ready
routines.purpose: Create and seed the bmo-tron worker sandbox after status and routing checks are understood.
